zh.lifeSummary: 當Ridder Wouter Arnoud Wouter Bakx van Broechoven於1220年1月11日出生在荷蘭布拉班特提爾包格時，他的母親Countess Agnes Waltherus Berthout van Mechelen Keerbergen39歲，父親Arnoldus Woutersz BAC TOT BAESCOT19歲。他於大約1247年與Gertrudis Willem Jan van Wijtvliet在荷蘭布拉班特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世在荷蘭努-布拉班特貝可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ridder Wouter Arnoud Wouter Bakx van Broechoven于1220年1月11日出生在荷兰布拉班特提爾包格时，他的母亲Countess Agnes Waltherus Berthout van Mechelen Keerbergen39岁，父亲Arnoldus Woutersz BAC TOT BAESCOT19岁。他于大约1247年与Gertrudis Willem Jan van Wijtvliet在荷兰布拉班特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世在荷兰努-布拉班特貝可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Bakx
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hungarian: habitational name for someone from a place called Bak or Baka.
Turkish: ornamental name or nickname from baki ‘lasting, enduring’.
Muslim (mainly Bangladesh): from a personal name based on Arabic bāqī ‘everlasting’.

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

en.lifeSummary: When Ridder Wouter Arnoud Wouter Bakx van Broechoven was born on 11 January 1220, in Tilburg, Brabant, Netherlands, his mother, Countess Agnes Waltherus Berthout van Mechelen Keerbergen, was 39 and his father, Arnoldus Woutersz BAC TOT BAESCOT, was 19. He married Gertrudis Willem Jan van Wijtvliet about 1247, in Brabant, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in Berkel, North Brabant, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ridder Wouter Arnoud Wouter Bakx van Broechoven est né le 11 janvier 1220, à Tilburg, Brabant, Pays-Bas, sa mère, Countess Agnes Waltherus Berthout van Mechelen Keerbergen, avait 39 ans et son père, Arnoldus Woutersz BAC TOT BAESCOT, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Gertrudis Willem Jan van Wijtvliet environ 1247, à Brabant, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé à Berkel, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ridder Wouter Arnoud Wouter Bakx van Broechoven am 11. Januar 1220 in Tilburg, Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war seine Mutter Countess Agnes Waltherus Berthout van Mechelen Keerbergen 39 und sein Vater Arnoldus Woutersz BAC TOT BAESCOT 19. Er hat um 1247 in Brabant, Niederlande Gertrudis Willem Jan van Wijtvliet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb in Berkel, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ridder Wouter Arnoud Wouter Bakx van Broechoven è nato il il 11 gennaio 1220 nel Tilburg, Brabant, Paesi Bassi, il suo madre, Countess Agnes Waltherus Berthout van Mechelen Keerbergen, aveva 39 anni e il suo padre, Arnoldus Woutersz BAC TOT BAESCOT, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Gertrudis Willem Jan van Wijtvliet circa 1247, nel Brabant, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel Berkel, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Ridder Wouter Arnoud Wouter Bakx van Broechovenが1220年1月11日にオランダブラバントティルブルグで生まれた時，母Countess Agnes Waltherus Berthout van Mechelen Keerbergenは39歳，父Arnoldus Woutersz BAC TOT BAESCOTは19歳であった。約1247年にオランダブラバントでGertrudis Willem Jan van Wijtvlietと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼はオランダノオルド-ブラバントバーケルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ridder Wouter Arnoud Wouter Bakx van Broechoven(이)가 1220년 1월 11일 네덜란드 브라반트 틸버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 어머니 Countess Agnes Waltherus Berthout van Mechelen Keerbergen(은)는 39세였고, 그의 아버지 Arnoldus Woutersz BAC TOT BAESCOT(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1247년 네덜란드 브라반트에서 Gertrudis Willem Jan van Wijtvliet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 버클에서 사망했다.

pt.Tilburg, Noord-Brabant, Nederland: Tilburg, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ridder Wouter Arnoud Wouter Bakx van Broechoven nasceu em 11 de janeiro de 1220, em Tilburg, Brabant, Países Baixos, sua mãe, Countess Agnes Waltherus Berthout van Mechelen Keerbergen, tinha 39 anos e seu pai, Arnoldus Woutersz BAC TOT BAESCOT, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Gertrudis Willem Jan van Wijtvliet aproximadamente 1247, em Brabant, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em Berkel, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos.

ro.Den Bosch, Brabant, Nederland: Den Bosch, Brabant, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ridder Wouter Arnoud Wouter Bakx van Broechoven родился 11 января 1220 г. в местности тилбург, брабант, Нидерланды, его матери по имени Countess Agnes Waltherus Berthout van Mechelen Keerbergen было 39 лет, а отцу, которого звали Arnoldus Woutersz BAC TOT BAESCOT, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Gertrudis Willem Jan van Wijtvliet около 1247 г. в местности брабант, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в местности биркел, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ridder Wouter Arnoud Wouter Bakx van Broechoven nació el 11 de enero de 1220, en Tilburg, Brabant, Países Bajos, su mamá, Countess Agnes Waltherus Berthout van Mechelen Keerbergen, tenía 39 años y su papá, Arnoldus Woutersz BAC TOT BAESCOT, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Gertrudis Willem Jan van Wijtvliet aproximadamente 1247, en Brabant, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en Berkel, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos.
